channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Should Hamilton have been penalised or was Russell collision racing incident?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Karun Chandhok was at the SkyPad to analyse whether Lewis Hamilton should have been awarded a five-second penalty for his collision with George Russell on the opening lap.

item.title: Van Gerwen's HILARIOUS response to missing nine-darter
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Michael van Gerwen was able to see the funny side after missing out on a 9-darter in Blackpool by mere millimetres.

item.title: Russell blames Mercedes power issue for collision with Hamilton
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: George Russell says a power issue with his Mercedes was to blame for leaving him vulnerable to a first-lap collision with Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton that took him out of the Belgian Grand Prix.

item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: More than 30 aspiring fashion entrepreneurs have graduated from the inaugural Fashion Incubator Scholarship Programme at the Ananse Centre for Design Lagos, marking a major milestone in Ananse’s mission to build Africa’s next generation of globally competitive fashion businesses. item.title: Allow south complete presidencial term – Osita Okechukwu to Atiku

item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: “Kosaye,” a Yoruba expression meaning ‘there is no hiding place’, encapsulates a new doctrine of intelligence-led policing designed to deny criminals the sanctuaries they have long exploited along the Lagos-Ogun axis The post Inside Operation Kosaye and Ogun’s new security doctrine, By Seyi Bakare a

item.title: US and Iran trade fire after two US soldiers killed in Jordan

item.title: Orchid is a delightfully retro and approachable hipster synth
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: In 2017, I bought an old Magnus chord organ off Craigslist for $10. It's one of my favorite music gear purchases. item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Their arrest which happened on Saturday was confirmed by the United States Marshals Service. They however, noted that they could not disclose the specific charges, citing a sealed arrest warrant.

item.title: Taraba LG Chairman Revokes Indigeneship Certificates
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The chairman of Gashaka local government area of Taraba, Mr Umar Yusuf, has revoked all existing indigeneship certificates in the council. The revocation was contained in a statement on Saturday in Wukari by the council’s director of Administration and General Services, Ali Baba. Yusuf said the acti

item.title: Iran attacks US Gulf allies, causing a fire at Kuwait power plant
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Kuwait and Bahrain report several rounds of Iranian missile, drone attacks; sirens reportedly sound in Jordan.

item.title: Who controls football in Palestine?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: For Palestinians fighting Israeli occupation, football has never been just a game.

item.title: Abiodun celebrates wife at 60, describes her as woman of virtue
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Ogun State Governor Dapo Abiodun on Sunday paid glowing tribute to his wife, Mrs Bamidele Abiodun, as she marked her 60th birthday, describing her as a woman of virtue, compassion and unwavering faith. The post Abiodun celebrates wife at 60, describes her as woman of virtue appeared first on The Sun

item.title: Stray bullet kills federal polytechnic students as security forces foil abduction in Borno — Official
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: “All rescued students have been confirmed medically stable, and no student was abducted,” he said. “Regrettably, some students were fatally struck by the sporadic gunfire from the terrorists during the firefight.” The post Stray bullet kills federal polytechnic students as security forces foil abduc

item.title: Shortage of Mental Health Experts Stalled My Bipolar Treatment — Ycee
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Shortage of Mental Health Experts Stalled My Bipolar Treatment — Ycee   Popular Nigerian rapper, Oludemilade Martin Alejo, widely known as Ycee, has revealed that the severe shortage of mental health practitioners in Nigeria has hindered his ongoing treatment for bipolar disorder.   The mu

item.title: Actress Linda Ejiofor Writes An ODE To Herself On Her 40th Birthday...
item.dc:creator: SDK Celeb
item.description: Beaituflly articulate Linda Ejiofor celebrated her 40th on July 17, 2026 and she wrote a beautoful ODE to her old self, her new self and her future self.......

item.title: US Marshals arrest the Tate brothers in Miami
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: The manosphere influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate were arrested Saturday in Miami by US Marshals in relation to new rape and sex trafficking charges in England. According to the Associated Press, British authorities are seeking the brothers' extradition. The new charges facing Andrew Tate include s

item.title: World Cup: Mbappe becomes fourth player ever to score 10 goals at single tournament
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: France captain, Kylian Mbappe, on Saturday became the fourth player in the history of the FIFA World Cup to score 10 goals or more at a single tournament. The Real Madrid forward achieved this feat after scoring a brace in France’s 6-4 defeat against England in the World Cup third-pl
